Typography

Skala Lato — heading, body, weight.

Font tunggal: Lato. Cuma pakai Regular & Bold buat teks umum — jangan tambah weight baru.

Heading

SizeContohFont sizeLine height
heading-xs Buat invoice 14px 20px
heading-sm Buat invoice 16px 20px
heading-md Buat invoice 22px 28px
heading-lg Buat invoice 28px 36px
heading-xl Buat invoice 34px 44px
heading-2xl Buat invoice 42px 52px
heading-3xl Buat invoice 52px 60px
heading-4xl Buat invoice 64px 72px
heading-5xl Buat invoice 72px 82px
heading-6xl Buat invoice 80px 92px

Body

SizeContohFont sizeLine height
body-sm Tagihan jatuh tempo 30 hari 12px 18px
body-md Tagihan jatuh tempo 30 hari 14px 22px
body-lg Tagihan jatuh tempo 30 hari 20px 30px
body-xl Tagihan jatuh tempo 30 hari 24px 36px

Weight

WeightContohNilai
Regular Paper.id 400
Medium Paper.id 500
Semibold Paper.id 600
Bold Paper.id 700
